step_1_image_prompt: An overhead flat-lay shot on a warm cream linen-textured surface with subtle weave detail visible across the fabric. Around the central area: a few large deep-green monstera leaves arranged along the upper edge with their fronds extending inward, a single sprig of soft sage eucalyptus draped diagonally across the lower-left, a small bundle of dried rose stems with muted dusty-pink blooms at the upper-right corner, and three small smooth river stones in graduated sizes along the right edge. The center of the composition is intentionally empty — clean cream linen surface with generous negative space, organically framed by the botanical elements without crowding the center. Bright soft natural daylight from above, even diffuse wash across the linen, very gentle shadows cast outward from each botanical element, warm cream tones throughout. Shot on Sony A7IV 50mm lens directly overhead. Real photograph, not AI-generated, candid moment. Real linen weave texture and natural plant detail, botanical wellness editorial organic premium mood, palette of warm cream linen, deep monstera green, sage eucalyptus, dried rose, river stone grey. Minimalist organic composition with deliberate emptiness at center.

fal_pulid_params.negative_prompt: extra limbs, deformed hands, mutated hands, bad anatomy, lowres, blurry, watermark, text, signature, distorted, plastic surfaces, oversaturated, AI-generated look, illustration, 3D render, CGI, person in frame, hand in frame, face in frame

step_2_brief.intended_grip_or_placement: The Alluvi box sits at the center of the composition, front face up to the camera, oriented horizontally. The botanical elements frame it organically without crowding the box itself.
step_2_brief.intended_product_position: Step 2 will composite the Alluvi box at the exact center of the frame, oriented horizontally with its long side parallel to the lower edge, front face directly up to the overhead camera, perfectly framed by the surrounding monstera, eucalyptus, dried roses, and river stones.

id_weight_recommendation.reasoning: No persona in frame — id_weight lowered from 1.0 to 0.5 to prevent PuLID from forcing any face or hand artifact into the empty center where the product will be composited in Step 2.
